content_body: This was the first time our parents came to this area (visiting from PA). We told them we were renting a cabin, they called it a castle, not a cabin and I have to agree. We felt like we were as close to Heaven as you can get here on earth. Thank you for the lovely setting. The cabin decor was out of this world. We love the "pump" faucet in the guest bathroom and the deer/bear/raccoon totem pole. Very cute! We were so busy we did not get to use the pool table or cinema, but it was great to have available. Everything was stocked nicely. God bless you and all future guests.
title: Relaxing Visit with Cabin Rentals of Georgia in a Beautiful Setting
